surfaces.proof_gap_note: Dedicated technique-section lift proof remains bundled through broader local-text contract fit.
Dedicated metadata-spine owner-fit proof remains indirect rather than surface-specific.
Direct proof that lifted relation hints never widen into graph semantics remains indirect.
Dedicated provenance-note recall proof remains indirect.
Chunk-segmentation-specific proof remains to be sharpened.
Direct proof of non-identity projection discipline at the KAG layer remains thin.
Dedicated proof for bridge-axis fidelity across larger ToS families remains open.
A dedicated counterpart non-identity proof lane is still missing.
Wider donor activation proof remains open.
Route-pack-specific relation fidelity proof remains open.
Adjunct-subordination proof under downstream consumer use remains open.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Source-owned tiny export and active technique lift surfaces may stay live.
waits_for: source-owned export tiers beyond the current tiny donor surface
owner-declared downstream need for a wider derived substrate slice
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer that active technique lift surfaces authorize a wider cross-repo federation graph.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Source-owned tiny export plus AOA-K-0005, AOA-K-0007, AOA-K-0010, and AOA-K-0011 may stay live only as source-first derivatives.
waits_for: additional source-owned export slices beyond the Zarathustra pilot
owner-declared canonical route families that need new derived handling
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer that one live ToS pilot authorizes KAG to replace Tree-of-Sophia authority.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Registry-visible donor and supporting bridge inputs may stay present while memory truth and writeback remain owner-owned.
waits_for: memo-owned durable-consequence or recall contracts that explicitly request a new derived surface
owner proof that future retention or live-ledger pressure is ready for KAG consumption
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer registry visibility as memo routing, writeback, or live-ledger readiness.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Proof anchors may be named, but proof verdicts remain outside KAG.
waits_for: dedicated proof bundles for current KAG proof gaps
portable verdict contracts that strengthen a waiting surface without moving proof ownership
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer named proof anchors as proof completion.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Playbooks may appear only as supporting refs in planned or guarded surfaces.
waits_for: source-owned playbook export with explicit provenance handles
owner-declared scenario contract that needs a bounded derived substrate view
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer supporting playbook inputs as KAG ownership of scenario composition.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Role contracts may be referenced at the boundary, but no live agent-derived substrate surface is owed yet.
waits_for: source-owned agent contract exports suitable for derived linking
reviewed consumer need that stays agent-contract-first
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer agent mention or boundary docs as license for hidden actor modeling in KAG.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Skill surfaces may inform ingress or guard posture, not live KAG growth.
waits_for: source-owned skill export or contract with explicit downstream substrate need
owner-declared reusable substrate slice that remains skill-owned
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer skill invocation posture as KAG ownership of execution workflows.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Routing may consume bounded KAG outputs, but routing truth stays outside the substrate.
waits_for: routing-owned entry ABI growth that explicitly names a new KAG consumer contract
owner-declared downstream route packs that cannot reuse the current spine or adjuncts
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer routability from registry visibility alone.

owner_wait_states.current_kag_posture: Derived observability may report on KAG health but cannot authorize new substrate families.
waits_for: stats-owned observability contract that clearly requires a new KAG feed
reviewed evidence that current KAG recovery surfaces are insufficient
owner_wait_states.forbidden_inference: Do not infer monitoring coverage as semantic ownership or proof.

resume_when: a neighboring owner repo publishes a stronger source-owned export or contract that clearly needs a new derived substrate surface
aoa-evals adds proof lanes that materially reduce current proof gaps for a waiting family
a live consumer contract cannot be satisfied by the current surface set without blurring boundaries
stop_rule.pause_threshold: No new AOA-K surfaces until owner-layer growth creates a real contract need.

quarantine_exit_requirements: fresh source-owned or owner-owned refs are reattached
one named regrounding mode is selected
projection health receipt or regrounding ticket is updated with reviewed evidence
